reviews.review_description: When buying the game, I was expecting a good game, but I ended up with a VERY great game. Orbeats is very challenging and you always want to go up on the leaderboard. So you start to make strategy on when to use your power up, Which block to break first and either with your gauntlet or racket... This game is really so much fun, try it out

reviews.review_title: Great variation of racket games; tip
reviews.review_description:
Unlike many racket games where you simply play ball, this game has other elements such as control of ball and timing of approaching blocks that makes it a fun and exciting experience. Its popularity and high rating is not without reasons.

If you’re still on the fence, there are various discount code sites that you can google, such as metadog. Or just visit zzzzz🔘bio🔘link

I got this game recently and I am already in love! The gameplay is so smooth and clear it tops beat saber! The aim of the game is you have a gun that shoots an orb and a tennis racquet to hit the ball back, there are many cool abilities and songs to play to. My favourite is the amazing vector graphic look. I would really recommend this! 🙂💯🙂

But it plays just as well seated. Interesting learning curve, doesn’t hold your hand too much. Great soundtrack and each level adds something new to the mix. By the end of the game I had my rhythm down pretty well. More elements to it that C-Smaash , great crisp visuals. Well worth it to see where they can take an addictive and enjoyable core game mechanic

This is some game. Really brought me back to the days of Dionakra but updated brilliantly. The physics are spot on and it's definitely got that "let's go again and beat my score" factor.
Great work! Grab it with the 30% off festive discount while you can!
Loving the buzz of Orbeats. The dynamic of the racket and tether two handed play allows you to build a fast pace. More intuitive than RacketNX and more engaging than Cybrix and C-smash.
really love this game!  Very intuitive and dynamic, makes for a great workout too! The visuals are so crisp and the soundtrack is great  — I highly recommend!

This game brings back memories of playing Alleyway on the Gameboy, but now I’m IN the game! 

The mechanics of it are just so good. I hope this gets plenty of support and a following, it deserves it!

b i t , l y / o r b e a t s v r

Great to see an original game come with shooting (sort of) and racket play. Not sure if there is enough of a goal for me as I never seem to lose and not sure how it's a rythym game or why levels are tied to songs. Maybe I missed something in the tutorial 😅

Still a great game and I do recommend.
